note: Replaced emergency green banner with 'Phase 2 Resumed' incident-resolved banner. Position: same area below the Developer Note. Default state: expanded with COLLAPSE/EXPAND toggle button (mirrors V11 hotfix banner pattern). State persists via localStorage key sost_phase2_resolved_collapsed. Body content covers: incident summary, root cause (rebuild required, not consensus rollback), block 7098-7104 table, DTD lottery verification with 3 winners, jackpot=0 explanation, cooldown clarification (C7.1 design), Explorer v121 lottery field reference, deploy instructions for node operators and miners (with --wallet + --mining-key-label requirement post 7100), final status checklist. v122 DTD panel + 4 charts preserved. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
